      2   -o --tcp-connect                  - Establish TCP connection for trigger
      2   -n --raw-send    [address:]<port> - Send raw packets to this
      2   -m --send-from        <address>   - Use this address as from address for mail

      2   -i --start-ish                    - Start an INCISION callback listener
      2   -h --help                         - This help message
      2   -f --tcp-flags    <flag>[,<flag>] - TCP flags (syn,fin,rst,push,ack,urg)
      2   -d --dns-flags        <bytes>     - Two bytes to place in DNS flags field
      2   -U --ur-compat                    - Maintain compatibility with UNITEDRAKE
      2   -T --trailer-bytes    <bytes>     - Two bytes to place at the end packet
      2   -M --list-icmp-options            - List typical ICMP options
      2   -L --list-firewall-types          - Print supported firewall types to stdout
      2   -K --set-time-skew                - The time skew to use, in seconds
      2   -I --icmp-options   <type>,<code> - ICMP Type and Code fields
      2   -F --bypass-firewall  <type>      - Bypass firewall (types: pix)
      2   -E --set-time                     - The time to use, in seconds since the epoch
      2   -C --command-id  <command>        - The command protocol to use.  Only 1 can be used.

      2                                       the response.
      2                                       the given network address. Default: use
      2                                       the command packet destination address
      2                                       packets to the given network address.
      2                                       packets as if they are originating from

      2                                       Example: 1,2

      2                                         reverse | forward
      2                                         Stego: None(1), IKEv2(2)
      2                                         Mode: Full(1), Sparse(2), Quick(3)
      2                                         Full, IKEv2

      2                                         Format should be <begin>:<end>
      2                                         <mask> Netmask for source ip.
